last_run.summary: Completed v4.8 final experiment closeout patch. Added main/scenario experiment matrices, dry-run matrix runner, statistics pipeline, final figure/export dry-run tooling, final ref artifacts, and VSCode entries. Focused validation and full pytest passed; no PPO/COMA/CL-PPO/GAM-COMA core logic or frozen Mainline-A core file was intentionally modified in this patch.
